metadata.jobspec_yaml:
apiVersion: eigen.os/v0.1
kind: QuantumJob
metadata:
  name: vqe-h2
spec:
  program: |
    @hybrid_program
    def main():
        return 1
  target: sim:local
  priority: 50
  compiler_options:
    optimization_level: "1"
  metadata:
    shots: "1024"
  dependencies:
    - s3://bucket/input.json
